title: Crude gains as Europe consider sanctioning Russia oil
section_path: Crude gains as Europe consider sanctioning Russia oil
section_path_text: Crude gains as Europe consider sanctioning Russia oil
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weak economic data in China weighed on sentiment early in the session. Thin liquidity was an issue with most markets closed for holidays. Crude oil fell in Asian trading after data showed the full impact of lockdowns in China.
